title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 178.170 - Qualifications of reader
text:
178.170.  Qualifications of reader. — If possible, the person selected as a reader for the blind pupil shall be a person who, in the judgment of the executive officer of the institution, is worthy of the assistance in pursuing his school work which the remuneration provided for in section 178.160 will accord him.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 13-17) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 177.150)
